data.body:
The only weird thing was the next morning no one could find me. They even went outside and down the block looking g for me.
Finally someone opened the shower curtain. I remember saying, "DO. YOU. MIIINNNDah"
Curtain closed back. I woke up fully about noon or 1 🤷🏼‍♀️.

Hey, I worked nites 😴 🥱
